title: peripterygium moluccanum
intro: Peripterygium moluccanum, also known as the Moluccan eye root or Chinese eye root, is a plant species native to China and parts of Southeast Asia. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat eye and skin conditions, including conjunctivitis and eczema. The plant contains compounds that have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits in treating various eye and skin disorders. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is often prepared as an infusion or tincture to treat eye and skin conditions, and is also used in modern herbal preparations to address similar health issues.
